bullets: Pray for Christians in Azerbaijan whose ancient church buildings have been demolished, that their cultural and spiritual heritage would be protected and their grief met with justice.
Pray for the injured and traumatized worshippers in Indonesia after a bomb detonated during Sunday Mass, that they would receive full healing and that their communities would not live in fear.
Pray for a young Christian girl with disabilities in Pakistan who was abducted and forcibly converted, that she would be found, safely restored to her family, and granted legal protection.

Ask God for mercy on house church believers in China held in secretive detention, that they would be released, their families comforted, and the broader crackdown on independent Christians brought to an end.
Pray for the grieving Muslim community in the United States after a hate-motivated attack killed three men at a place of worship in San Diego, and for an end to religiously motivated violence.
Lift up civilians in Ukraine as the UN warns the war is deadlier than ever, with nearly 800 children among more than 15,000 confirmed killed and peace talks still stalled.
Ask God for protection over Palestinian civilians in the West Bank facing an accelerating pace of forced displacement unlike anything seen in decades, and for accountability under international law.
Pray for civilians across Iran and the wider Middle East region living under the threat of large-scale military conflict, and for negotiators to find a peaceful and lasting resolution.
Lift up the people of Lebanon where more than 3,000 have been killed since fighting escalated, and where strikes on civilian areas have continued even after a ceasefire agreement.

Ask God for protection of the nuclear facility and surrounding civilian population in the United Arab Emirates following a drone strike near a nuclear power plant, and for warring parties to uphold protections for civilian infrastructure.

Pray for the people of Bolivia enduring their worst economic crisis in 40 years, with shortages of food, fuel, and medicine worsening as protests and clashes with security forces continue in the capital.
Lift up Kenyan families mourning four people killed during nationwide protests over rising fuel prices, and for restraint from all sides so that legitimate grievances can be heard peacefully.

Ask God for comfort and courage for ordinary Cubans already struggling with power outages and food shortages, now facing fears of military conflict after their government issued emergency war-preparedness guidance.
Pray for millions across Latin America and the Caribbean facing hunger, displacement, and water shortages as extreme weather events grow more intense and more frequent.
Lift up Kurdish communities across the region facing increased danger and false accusations amid a volatile and rapidly shifting conflict, and for leaders to pursue truth and restraint.
Ask God for civilians in Venezuela grieving loved ones who died in state custody, and for the release of political prisoners whose families have suffered tremendous loss.
Pray for civilians in Haiti, especially children, caught in ongoing gang violence that continues to destabilize communities and harm the most vulnerable.
Ask God for wisdom for leaders in Egypt and across the Middle East as they navigate extraordinary regional pressure, and for a path toward de-escalation and lasting peace.
Pray for communities in Vanuatu and China affected by earthquakes and deadly flooding, asking God to protect the vulnerable, comfort the grieving, and guide rescue teams to those still missing.
Lift up the millions of people across Latin America and the Caribbean facing hunger, water shortages, and displacement due to worsening extreme weather, asking God to provide relief and sustain hope.
Ask God to watch over remote communities in Alaska's Aleutian Islands, Papua New Guinea, Japan, and the Solomon Islands as residents assess the impact of recent earthquakes and seek safety.
